perFrameCode: //q32 -- volume        Rough signal indicating loudness (0 to 2-ish)
//q30 -- vol_texture   How rough or smooth is volume (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q29 -- bass_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in bass
//q28 -- bass_weight   % of total volume that is bass (0 to 1)
//q27 -- bass_text     How rough or smooth is bass   (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q26 -- mid_beat      boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in mid
//q25 -- mid_weight    % of total volume that is mid  (0 to 1)
//q24 -- mid_text      How rough or smooth is mid    (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q23 -- treb_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in treb
//q22 -- treb_weight   % of total volume that is treb (0 to 1)
//q21 -- treb_tex      How rough or smooth is treb   (0=leg, 1=stec)
//   set these variables to taste, or control them with your code!
// These increase the senstivity of the beat detectors (0 to 1)
// Use these to set the sensitivity of the texture signals (0 .. 100)
// Set weights_smooth to 0 if you want to use the rougher signal
q32 = 1 / min((bass + mid + treb), 33);  q31 = 1 / min((bass_att + mid_att + treb_att), 33);
q28 = if((weights_smooth), bass_att * q31, bass * q32);
q27 = min(b_tex * 1.333, 1);  q26 = if((floor(max(mid  -  mid_att, 0) * (20 * m_beat_sens))),1,0);
q25 = if((weights_smooth), mid_att * q31, mid * q32);
q24 = min(m_tex * 1.166, 1);  q23 = if((floor(max(treb - treb_att, 0) * (20 * t_beat_sens))),1,0);
q22 = if((weights_smooth), treb_att * q31, treb * q32);
q21 = min(t_tex * 1.166, 1);  q32 = (bass + mid + treb);  q31 = (bass_att + mid_att + treb_att);
// q1 = spotlight x (0 ... 1 = left to right)
// q2 = spotlight y (0 ... 1 = top to bottom)
// q3 = spotlight z (0 ... 1 = in to and out of screen)
// q7 = environmental light angle phi (0 ... 2pi = angle in the x,y plane)
// q8 = env light angle theta (-1/2pi ... 0 ... 1/2pi = elevation of q6 angle)
//      You should still have 20 user variables left and q13 to q20
//       VVVVVVVVVVV  Add your beautiful code below  VVVVVVVVVVV
